title: SQLancer query: 'calc.bit' undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 String NOT NULL, c2 Int32, c3 Decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES ('test', NULL, 1.23);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c4 Date NOT NULL, c5 UInt8);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL AND c2 = (SELECT MAX(c2) FROM t1);
key_bug_features: Undefined behavior with complex SQL query involving aggregates
